goal: Rewrite LoanBatchServiceImpl with all 7 safeguards (7.2-7.8) and update the controller

tasks.name: Implement idempotency, sequential enforcement, and batch log tracking
tasks.action: Add processMonthlyLoans(YearMonth, String) to interface. Implement in LoanBatchServiceImpl: inject BatchProcessingLogRepository and ConfigService. Check idempotency via existsByProcessingMonth (7.4). Enforce sequential month via last_processed_month config (7.5). Create/update BatchProcessingLog entries (7.8). Delegate existing processOutstandingLoans() cron to the new method.

tasks.name: Implement loan filtering, configurable day, and pre-processing warnings
tasks.action: Within processMonthlyLoans: read loan.batch.processing_day_of_month for configurable day (7.2). Filter loans where disbursedAt is in target month (7.6). Read loan.batch.new_loan_threshold_day and skip loans disbursed after threshold (7.3). Call detectUnpaidLoans and include as warnings in result (7.7). Store warningsSummary in BatchProcessingLog.

tasks.name: Update LoanBatchController
tasks.action: Accept optional @RequestParam YearMonth targetMonth in processBatch. If not provided, auto-determine next month. Pass triggeredBy from getCurrentUsername(). Handle IllegalStateException for safeguard violations with 409 response.
